blocks.text: Record-breaking cricket news: From buying own kit to first Lord's Test - England set for more history. Less than a week on from the Women's T20 World Cup final, Charlotte Edwards and Nat Sciver-Brunt prepare to lead England in the historic first women's Test match at Lord's.
